ogTitle: Mulyandry vs Mumblebone Plain: Climate Safety

heading: Mulyandry vs Mumblebone Plain — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mulyandry, New South Wales and Mumblebone Plain, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mulyandry has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Mumblebone Plain (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mulyandry or Mumblebone Plain safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mulyandry has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Mumblebone Plain scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mulyandry scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Mumblebone Plain scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mulyandry or Mumblebone Plain?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mulyandry has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
